message:
fix: replace namespace import with named imports for js-yaml tree-shaking (#5896)

\`import * as yaml from 'js-yaml'\` prevents tree-shaking. Use named
imports for the two functions actually used (load, loadAll).

Fixes #5894

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
